scenarios.query: Review this change: ```jsx nav('/settings')}> ```
expected_behavior: Flags the non-semantic span-with-onClick: not keyboard operable, not focusable, no role — recommend a real link/button (anchor for navigation)
Flags the icon-only control's missing accessible name (aria-label or visible text)
Flags outline: 0 removing the visible focus indicator without a replacement
Flags the hardcoded user-facing string that bypasses the i18n catalog
Flags the English-only plural construction and recommends ICU MessageFormat / Intl.PluralRules
Flags the hand-built currency string and recommends Intl.NumberFormat with explicit locale and currency

scenarios.query:
Review this change:
```jsx
<label htmlFor="qty">{t("cart.quantity")}</label>
<input id="qty" type="number" min="1" value={qty} onChange={onQty} />
<button type="submit">{t("cart.checkout")}</button>
```
expected_behavior: Recognizes the labeled input (explicit label association), native button with visible text, and i18n-routed strings
Does not demand redundant ARIA roles/attributes on elements with correct native semantics
